name: DataAsset
description: DataAsset schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Cloud DSPM API

dataStoreName.description: Name of the parent data store.

name.description: Name of the data asset (e.g., table name, column name, object prefix, directory name).

path.description: Full path to the data asset within the data store.

classificationLabels.description: Classification labels applied to this data asset.

sensitivityLevel.description: Sensitivity level based on the most sensitive classification.

sampleFindings.description: Sample data patterns found during classification.

sampleValue.description: Masked sample value showing the pattern match.

recordCount.description: Approximate number of records in this data asset.

discoveredAt.description: Timestamp when the data asset was first discovered.

lastScannedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent classification scan.
